'''Stellskard''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Banvhar Station]] who worked as a [[Miner/Legends|miner]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a galactic conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], he joined [[Flynn Kybo]]'s hunt for [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]].

==Biography==
During the galactic conflict, Stellskard worked as an asteroid miner in the Banvhar Station until it was attacked by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] and his droid army. As one of the few survivors, Stellskard vowed to avenge the senseless destruction that Grievous and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] have caused. He later joined a group of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bryndar]] and plan an attack against Grievous. As they succeeded in tracking the Separatist General on [[Belsus/Legends|Belsus]], Stellskards and his colleagues were so deep on Grievous' atrocities and accompanied the Jedi on a daring mission to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. After stealing a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] freighter, they succeeded in landing on the moon. As the Jedi prepared to engage Grievous, Stellskard volunteered in defending the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] and allow the captive [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiates]] to flee.
